hataku.name: Pound
hataku.desc: The target is physically pounded with a long tail, a foreleg, or the like.

honoonopanchi.desc: The target is attacked with a fiery punch. This may also leave the target with a burn.

reitoupanchi.name: Ice Punch
reitoupanchi.desc: The target is attacked with an icy punch. This may also leave the target frozen.

kaminaripanchi.name: Thunder Punch
kaminaripanchi.desc: The target is attacked with an electrified punch. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

hasamigirochin.desc: A vicious tearing attack with big pincers. The target faints instantly if this attack hits.

tsuruginomai.name: Swords Dance
tsuruginomai.desc: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply boosts the user's Attack stat.

fukitobashi.desc: The target is blown away, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

sorawotobu.name: Fly
sorawotobu.desc: The user flies up into the sky on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

shimetsukeru.name: Bind
shimetsukeru.desc: A long body, tentacles, or the like are used to bind and squeeze the target for four to five turns.

megatonkikku.desc: The target is attacked by a kick launched with muscle-packed power.

tsunodoriru.desc: The user stabs the target with a horn that rotates like a drill. The target faints instantly if this attack hits.

noshikakari.desc: The user attacks by dropping onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

makitsuku.desc: A long body, vines, or the like are used to wrap and squeeze the target for four to five turns.

abareru.desc: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

sutemitakkuru.desc: A reckless life-risking tackle in which the user rushes the target. This also damages the user quite a lot.

misairubari.name: Pin Missile
misairubari.desc: The user attacks by shooting sharp spikes at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

kamitsuku.name: Bite
kamitsuku.desc: The target is bitten with viciously sharp fangs. This may also make the target flinch.

hoeru.name: Roar

shibiregona.name: Stun Spore
shibiregona.desc: The user scatters a cloud of numbing powder that paralyzes the target.

nemurigona.name: Sleep Powder
nemurigona.desc: The user scatters a cloud of soporific dust that puts the target to sleep.

hanabiranomai.name: Petal Dance
hanabiranomai.desc: The user attacks the target by scattering petals for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

itowohaku.name: String Shot
itowohaku.desc: The user blows silk from its mouth that binds opposing Pokémon and harshly lowers their Speed stats.

honoonouzu.name: Fire Spin
honoonouzu.desc: The user traps the target inside a fierce vortex of fire that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

denjiha.name: Thunder Wave
denjiha.desc: The user launches a weak jolt of electricity that paralyzes the target.

kaminari.name: Thunder
kaminari.desc: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

jishin.name: Earthquake
jishin.desc: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.

jiware.name: Fissure
jiware.desc: The user opens up a fissure in the ground and drops the target in. The target faints instantly if this attack hits.

anawohoru.name: Dig
anawohoru.desc: The user burrows into the ground on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

dokudoku.name: Toxic
dokudoku.desc: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

saikokineshisu.name: Psychic
saikokineshisu.desc: The target is hit with a strong telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

saiminjutsu.name: Hypnosis
saiminjutsu.desc: The user employs hypnotic suggestion to make the target fall asleep.

kousokuidou.name: Agility
kousokuidou.desc: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply boosts its Speed stat.

denkousekka.name: Quick Attack
denkousekka.desc: The user lunges at the target to inflict damage, moving at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

naitoheddo.name: Night Shade
naitoheddo.desc: The user makes the target see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.

iyanaoto.name: Screech
iyanaoto.desc: An earsplitting screech harshly lowers the target's Defense stat.

kagebunshin.name: Double Team
kagebunshin.desc: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

jikosaisei.name: Recover
jikosaisei.desc: The user regenerates its cells, restoring its own HP by up to half its max HP.

chiisakunaru.name: Minimize
chiisakunaru.desc: The user compresses its body to make itself look smaller, which sharply boosts its evasiveness.

ayashiihikari.name: Confuse Ray
ayashiihikari.desc: The target is exposed to a sinister ray that causes confusion.

hikarinokabe.name: Light Screen
hikarinokabe.desc: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.

kuroikiri.name: Haze
kuroikiri.desc: The user creates a haze that eliminates every stat change among all the Pokémon engaged in battle.

rifurekutaa.name: Reflect
rifurekutaa.desc: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

kiaidame.name: Focus Energy
kiaidame.desc: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that its future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits.

jibaku.name: Self-Destruct
jibaku.desc: The user attacks everything around it by causing an explosion. The user faints upon using this move.

daimonji.name: Fire Blast
daimonji.desc: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

takinobori.name: Waterfall
takinobori.desc: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch.

dowasure.name: Amnesia
dowasure.desc: The user temporarily empties its mind to forget its concerns. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Def stat.

tobihizageri.name: High Jump Kick
tobihizageri.desc: The target is attacked with a knee kick from a jump. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.

hebinirami.name: Glare
hebinirami.desc: The user intimidates the target with the pattern on its belly to cause paralysis.

kyuuketsu.name: Leech Life
kyuuketsu.desc: The user drains the target's blood. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

goddobaado.name: Sky Attack
goddobaado.desc: The user attacks the turn after using this move. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also make the target flinch.

henshin.name: Transform
henshin.desc: The user transforms into a copy of the target, right down to having the same move set.

tokeru.name: Acid Armor
tokeru.desc: The user alters its cellular structure to liquefy itself, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

kurabuhanmaa.name: Crabhammer
kurabuhanmaa.desc: The target is hammered with a large pincer. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

daibakuhatsu.name: Explosion
daibakuhatsu.desc: The user attacks everything around it by causing a tremendous explosion. The user faints upon using this move.

nemuru.name: Rest
nemuru.desc: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.

iwanadare.name: Rock Slide
iwanadare.desc: Large boulders are hurled at opposing Pokémon to inflict damage. This may also make the opposing Pokémon flinch.

toraiatakku.name: Tri Attack
toraiatakku.desc: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. This may also burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

ikarinomaeba.name: Super Fang
ikarinomaeba.desc: The user chomps hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. This cuts the target's HP in half.

migawari.name: Substitute
migawari.desc: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

dorobou.name: Thief
dorobou.desc: The user attacks and steals the target's held item simultaneously. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.

ibiki.name: Snore
ibiki.desc: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

noroi.name: Curse
noroi.desc: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

jitabata.name: Flail
jitabata.desc: The user flails about aimlessly to attack. The less HP the user has, the greater the move's power.

watahoushi.name: Cotton Spore
watahoushi.desc: The user releases cotton-like spores that cling to opposing Pokémon. This harshly lowers their Speed stats.

kishikaisei.name: Reversal
kishikaisei.desc: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

urami.name: Spite
urami.desc: The user unleashes its grudge on the move last used by the target by cutting 4 PP from it.

mamoru.name: Protect
mamoru.desc: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

mahhapanchi.name: Mach Punch
mahhapanchi.desc: The user throws a punch at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

kowaikao.name: Scary Face
kowaikao.desc: The user frightens the target with a scary face to harshly lower its Speed stat.

tenshinokissu.name: Sweet Kiss
tenshinokissu.desc: The user kisses the target with a sweet, angelic cuteness that causes confusion.

haradaiko.name: Belly Drum
haradaiko.desc: The user maximizes its Attack stat but loses HP equal to half its max HP.

hedorobakudan.name: Sludge Bomb
hedorobakudan.desc: The user hurls unsanitary sludge at the target to inflict damage. This may also poison the target.

dorokake.name: Mud-Slap
dorokake.desc: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.

makibishi.name: Spikes
makibishi.desc: The user lays a trap of spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will damage opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

denjihou.name: Zap Cannon
denjihou.desc: The user attacks by firing an electric blast like a cannon. This also leaves the target with paralysis.

michizure.name: Destiny Bond
michizure.desc: If the user is knocked out after using this move, the Pokémon that knocked it out will also faint. This move's chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

horobinouta.name: Perish Song
horobinouta.desc: Any Pokémon that hears this song faints in three turns, unless it switches out of battle.

kogoerukaze.name: Icy Wind
kogoerukaze.desc: The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. This also lowers opposing Pokémon's Speed stats.

mikiri.name: Detect
mikiri.desc: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

boonrasshu.name: Bone Rush
boonrasshu.desc: The user attacks by striking the target with a hard bone. This move hits two to five times in a row.

rokkuon.name: Lock-On
rokkuon.desc: The user takes sure aim at the target. This ensures the user's next move does not miss that target.

gekirin.name: Outrage
gekirin.desc: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

sunaarashi.name: Sandstorm
sunaarashi.desc: A five-turn sandstorm is summoned to damage all Pokémon except Rock, Ground, and Steel types. The sandstorm also boosts the Sp. Def stats of Rock types.

gigadorein.name: Giga Drain
gigadorein.desc: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

koraeru.name: Endure
koraeru.desc: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.

amaeru.name: Charm
amaeru.desc: The user gazes at the target rather charmingly, making it less wary. This harshly lowers the target's Attack stat.

ibaru.name: Swagger
ibaru.desc: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

haganenotsubasa.name: Steel Wing
haganenotsubasa.desc: The target is hit with wings of steel. This may also boost the user's Defense stat.

kuroimanazashi.name: Mean Look
kuroimanazashi.desc: The user pins the target with a dark, arresting look. The target becomes unable to flee.

meromero.name: Attract
meromero.desc: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.

negoto.name: Sleep Talk
negoto.desc: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.

iyashinosuzu.name: Heal Bell
iyashinosuzu.desc: The user makes a soothing bell chime to cure the status conditions of all its fellow party Pokémon and allies.

shinpinomamori.name: Safeguard
shinpinomamori.desc: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

itamiwake.name: Pain Split
itamiwake.desc: The user adds its HP to the target's HP, then equally splits the combined HP between the target and itself.

bakuretsupanchi.name: Dynamic Punch
bakuretsupanchi.desc: The user attacks by punching the target with full concentrated power. This also confuses the target.

megahoon.name: Megahorn
megahoon.desc: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user rams into the target with no letup.

batontatchi.name: Baton Pass
batontatchi.desc: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.

ankooru.name: Encore
ankooru.desc: The user compels the target to keep using the move it encored for three turns.

kousokusupin.name: Rapid Spin
kousokusupin.desc: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

amaikaori.name: Sweet Scent
amaikaori.desc: The user releases a scent that harshly lowers opposing Pokémon's evasiveness.

aianteeru.name: Iron Tail
aianteeru.desc: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

asanohizashi.name: Morning Sun
asanohizashi.desc: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

kougousei.name: Synthesis
kougousei.desc: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

tsukinohikari.name: Moonlight
tsukinohikari.desc: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

kurosuchoppu.name: Cross Chop
kurosuchoppu.desc: The user delivers a double chop with its forearms crossed. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

amagoi.name: Rain Dance
amagoi.desc: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

nihonbare.name: Sunny Day
nihonbare.desc: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

kamikudaku.name: Crunch
kamikudaku.desc: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

miraakooto.name: Mirror Coat
miraakooto.desc: A retaliatory attack that counters any special move, inflicting double the damage taken.

jikoanji.name: Psych Up
jikoanji.desc: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the target.

shinsoku.name: Extreme Speed
shinsoku.desc: The user charges the target at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

genshinochikara.name: Ancient Power
genshinochikara.desc: The user attacks with a prehistoric power. This may also boost all the user's stats at once.

shadoobooru.name: Shadow Ball
shadoobooru.desc: The user attacks by hurling a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

miraiyochi.name: Future Sight
miraiyochi.desc: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.

uzushio.name: Whirlpool
uzushio.desc: The user traps the target inside a violent, swirling whirlpool that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

fukurodataki.name: Beat Up
fukurodataki.desc: The user gets all party Pokémon to attack the target. The more party Pokémon, the greater the number of attacks.

nekodamashi.name: Fake Out
nekodamashi.desc: This attack hits first and makes the target flinch. It works only on the first turn each time the user enters battle.

sawagu.name: Uproar
sawagu.desc: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.

takuwaeru.name: Stockpile
takuwaeru.desc: The user stores power and boosts its Defense and Sp. Def stats. This move can be used up to three times.

hakidasu.name: Spit Up
hakidasu.desc: The power stored using the move Stockpile is released at once in an attack. The more power is stored, the greater the move's power.

nomikomu.name: Swallow
nomikomu.desc: The power stored using the move Stockpile is absorbed by the user to restore its own HP. The more power is stored, the more HP is restored.

neppuu.name: Heat Wave
neppuu.desc: The user attacks by exhaling hot breath on opposing Pokémon. This may also leave them with a burn.

ichamon.name: Torment
ichamon.desc: The user torments and enrages the target, making it incapable of using the same move twice in a row.

odateru.name: Flatter
odateru.desc: Flattery is used to confuse the target. However, this also boosts the target's Sp. Atk stat.

onibi.name: Will-O-Wisp
onibi.desc: The user shoots a sinister flame at the target to inflict a burn.

okimiyage.name: Memento
okimiyage.desc: The user faints. In return, the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats are harshly lowered.

karagenki.name: Facade
karagenki.desc: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

kiaipanchi.name: Focus Punch
kiaipanchi.desc: The user focuses its mind before launching a punch. This move fails if the user is hit before using the move.

konoyubitomare.name: Follow Me
konoyubitomare.desc: The user draws attention to itself, making all opposing Pokémon take aim only at the user.

juuden.name: Charge
juuden.desc: The user becomes charged, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move it uses. This also boosts the user's Sp. Def stat.

chouhatsu.name: Taunt
chouhatsu.desc: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

tedasuke.name: Helping Hand
tedasuke.desc: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

torikku.name: Trick
torikku.desc: The user catches the target off guard and swaps the target's held item with its own.

narikiri.name: Role Play
narikiri.desc: The user mimics the target completely, copying the target's Ability.

negaigoto.name: Wish
negaigoto.desc: One turn after this move is used, the user's or its replacement's HP is restored by up to half the user's max HP.

newoharu.name: Ingrain
newoharu.desc: The user lays roots that restore its own HP every turn. Because the user is now rooted, it can't switch out.

bakajikara.name: Superpower
bakajikara.desc: The user attacks the target with great power. This also lowers the user's Attack and Defense stats.

risaikuru.name: Recycle
risaikuru.desc: The user recycles a held item that has been used in battle so it can be used again.

kawarawari.name: Brick Break
kawarawari.desc: The user attacks with a swift chop. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

akubi.name: Yawn
akubi.desc: The user lets loose a huge yawn that lulls the target into falling asleep on the next turn.

hatakiotosu.name: Knock Off
hatakiotosu.desc: The user slaps down the target's held item, making it unusable for that battle. This move does more damage if the target has a held item.

gamushara.name: Endeavor
gamushara.desc: The user inflicts damage by cutting down the target's HP to roughly equal the user's HP.

funka.name: Eruption
funka.desc: The user attacks opposing Pokémon with explosive fury. The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power.

sukirusuwappu.name: Skill Swap
sukirusuwappu.desc: The user employs its psychic power to exchange Abilities with the target.

fuuin.name: Imprison
fuuin.desc: If opposing Pokémon know any move also known by the user, they are prevented from using it.

daibingu.name: Dive
daibingu.desc: The user dives on the first turn, then floats up and attacks on the next turn.

fezadansu.name: Feather Dance
fezadansu.desc: The user covers the target's body with a mass of down that harshly lowers its Attack stat.

furafuradansu.name: Teeter Dance
furafuradansu.desc: The user performs a wobbly dance that confuses every Pokémon around it.

bureizukikku.name: Blaze Kick
bureizukikku.desc: The user launches a kick that has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit. This may also leave the target with a burn.

namakeru.name: Slack Off
namakeru.desc: The user slacks off, restoring its own HP by up to half its max HP.

haipaaboisu.name: Hyper Voice
haipaaboisu.desc: The user attacks by letting loose a horribly loud, resounding cry.

dokudokunokiba.name: Poison Fang
dokudokunokiba.desc: The user bites the target with toxic fangs. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.

bureikukuroo.name: Crush Claw
bureikukuroo.desc: The user slashes the target with hard and sharp claws. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

burasutobaan.name: Blast Burn
burasutobaan.desc: The target is razed by a fiery explosion. The user can't move on the next turn.

haidorokanon.name: Hydro Cannon
haidorokanon.desc: The target is hit with a watery blast. The user can't move on the next turn.

komettopanchi.name: Meteor Mash
komettopanchi.desc: The target is hit with a hard punch fired like a meteor. This may also boost the user’s Attack stat.

uezaabooru.name: Weather Ball
uezaabooru.desc: This move's type and power change depending on the weather at the time the move is used.

usonaki.name: Fake Tears
usonaki.desc: The user feigns crying to fluster the target. This harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

eakattaa.name: Air Cutter
eakattaa.desc: The user launches razor-like wind to slash opposing Pokémon. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

oobaahiito.name: Overheat
oobaahiito.desc: The user attacks the target with all its might. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

gansekifuuji.name: Rock Tomb
gansekifuuji.desc: The user hurls boulders at the target to inflict damage. This also lowers the target's Speed stat by cutting off its movement.

kinzokuon.name: Metal Sound
kinzokuon.desc: A horrible sound like scraping metal harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

kusuguru.name: Tickle
kusuguru.desc: The user tickles the target into laughing, lowering its Attack and Defense stats.

kosumopawaa.name: Cosmic Power
kosumopawaa.desc: The user absorbs a mystical power from space to boost its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

shiofuki.name: Water Spout
shiofuki.desc: The user spouts water to damage opposing Pokémon. The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power.

shadoopanchi.name: Shadow Punch
shadoopanchi.desc: The user throws a punch from the shadows. This attack never misses.

jintsuuriki.name: Extrasensory
jintsuuriki.desc: The user attacks with an odd, unseeable power. This may also make the target flinch.

sunajigoku.name: Sand Tomb
sunajigoku.desc: The user traps the target inside a harshly raging sandstorm that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

zettaireido.name: Sheer Cold
zettaireido.desc: The target faints instantly. This move is less likely to hit the target if used by Pokémon other than Ice types.

dakuryuu.name: Muddy Water
dakuryuu.desc: The user attacks by shooting muddy water at opposing Pokémon. This may also lower their accuracy.

tanemashingan.name: Bullet Seed
tanemashingan.desc: The user attacks by forcefully shooting seeds at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

tsubamegaeshi.name: Aerial Ace
tsubamegaeshi.desc: The user confounds the target with speed, then slashes. This attack never misses.

tsurarabari.name: Icicle Spear
tsurarabari.desc: The user attacks by launching sharp icicles at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

teppeki.name: Iron Defense
teppeki.desc: The user hardens its body's surface like iron, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

toosenbou.name: Block
toosenbou.desc: The user blocks the target's way with arms spread wide to prevent the target from fleeing.

tooboe.name: Howl
tooboe.desc: The user howls loudly to rouse itself and its allies. This boosts their Attack stats.

doragonkuroo.name: Dragon Claw
doragonkuroo.desc: The user slashes the target with huge, sharp claws to inflict damage.

haadopuranto.name: Frenzy Plant
haadopuranto.desc: The user slams the target with the roots of an enormous tree. The user can't move on the next turn.

birudoappu.name: Bulk Up
birudoappu.desc: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, boosting its Attack and Defense stats.

tobihaneru.name: Bounce
tobihaneru.desc: The user bounces up high on the first turn, then drops onto the target on the next turn. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

maddoshotto.name: Mud Shot
maddoshotto.desc: The user attacks by hurling a blob of mud at the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

hoshigaru.name: Covet
hoshigaru.desc: The user endearingly approaches the target, then steals the target's held item.

borutekkaa.name: Volt Tackle
borutekkaa.desc: The user electrifies itself and charges the target. This also damages the user quite a lot. This attack may leave the target with paralysis.

meisou.name: Calm Mind
meisou.desc: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to boost its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

riifubureedo.name: Leaf Blade
riifubureedo.desc: The user handles a sharp leaf like a sword and cuts the target to inflict damage. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

ryuunomai.name: Dragon Dance
ryuunomai.desc: The user vigorously performs a mystic, powerful dance that boosts its Attack and Speed stats.

rokkuburasuto.name: Rock Blast
rokkuburasuto.desc: The user attacks by hurling hard rocks at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

mizunohadou.name: Water Pulse
mizunohadou.desc: The user attacks the target with a pulsing blast of water. This may also confuse the target.

haneyasume.name: Roost
haneyasume.desc: The user lands and rests its body. This move restores the user's HP by up to half its max HP.

juuryoku.name: Gravity
juuryoku.desc: Enables Flying types or Pokémon with the Levitate Ability to be hit by Ground-type moves for five turns. Moves that involve flying can't be used.

aamuhanmaa.name: Hammer Arm
aamuhanmaa.desc: The user swings its strong, heavy fist at the target to inflict damage. This also lowers the user's Speed stat.

jairobooru.name: Gyro Ball
jairobooru.desc: The user tackles the target with a high-speed spin. The slower the user is than the target, the greater the move's power.

iyashinonegai.name: Healing Wish
iyashinonegai.desc: The user faints. In return, the Pokémon taking its place will have its HP restored and status conditions cured.

feinto.name: Feint
feinto.desc: This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect. This also lifts the effects of those moves.

tsuibamu.name: Pluck
tsuibamu.desc: The user attacks by pecking the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

oikaze.name: Tailwind
oikaze.desc: The user whips up a turbulent whirlwind that boosts the Speed stats of itself and its allies for four turns.

tsubowotsuku.name: Acupressure
tsubowotsuku.desc: The user applies pressure to stress points, sharply boosting one of its or its allies' stats.

metarubaasuto.name: Metal Burst
metarubaasuto.desc: The user retaliates with much greater force against the opponent that last inflicted damage on it.

tonbogaeri.name: U-turn
tonbogaeri.desc: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

infaito.name: Close Combat
infaito.desc: The user fights the target up close, inflicting damage without guarding itself. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats.

shippegaeshi.name: Payback
shippegaeshi.desc: The user stores power, then attacks. This move's power is doubled if the user moves after the target.

dameoshi.name: Assurance
dameoshi.desc: This move's power is doubled if the target has already taken some damage in the same turn.

nagetsukeru.name: Fling
nagetsukeru.desc: The user flings its held item at the target to attack. This move's power and effects depend on the item.

pawaatorikku.name: Power Trick
pawaatorikku.desc: The user employs its psychic power to switch its Attack stat with its Defense stat.

ieki.name: Gastro Acid
ieki.desc: The user hurls up its stomach acids on the target. The fluid eliminates the effect of the target's Ability.

manekko.name: Copycat
manekko.desc: The user mimics the move used immediately before it. The move fails if no other move has been used yet.

pawaasuwappu.name: Power Swap
pawaasuwappu.desc: The user employs its psychic power to switch changes to its Attack and Sp. Atk stats with the target.

gaadosuwappu.name: Guard Swap
gaadosuwappu.desc: The user employs its psychic power to switch changes to its Defense and Sp. Def stats with the target.

totteoki.name: Last Resort
totteoki.desc: This move can be used only after the user has used all the other moves it knows in the battle.

nayaminotane.name: Worry Seed

fuiuchi.name: Sucker Punch

dokubishi.name: Toxic Spikes
dokubishi.desc: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will poison opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

aquaring.name: Aqua Ring

denjifuyuu.name: Magnet Rise

fureadoraibu.name: Flare Blitz

honoonomuchi.name: Solar Blade
honoonomuchi.desc: The user gathers light on the first turn, then fills a blade with the light's energy and attacks on the next turn.

hoobaru.name: Zippy Zap
hoobaru.desc: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

mahounokona.name: Pika Papow
mahounokona.desc: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

ochakai.name: Buzzy Buzz
ochakai.desc: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

sourubiito.name: Max Flare
sourubiito.desc: This is a Fire-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user intensifies the sun for five turns.

bodipuresu.name: Max Flutterby
bodipuresu.desc: This is a Bug-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

dekoreeshon.name: Max Lightning
dekoreeshon.desc: This is an Electric-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Electric Terrain for five turns.

torabasami.name: Max Knuckle
torabasami.desc: This is a Fighting-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Attack stats.

ooraguruma.name: Max Geyser
ooraguruma.desc: This is a Water-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns.

waidobureikaa.name: Max Airstream
waidobureikaa.desc: This is a Flying-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Speed stats.

ringosan.name: Max Mindstorm
ringosan.desc: This is a Psychic-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Psychic Terrain for five turns.

gnochikara.name: Max Rockfall
gnochikara.desc: This is a Rock-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user summons a sandstorm lasting five turns.

inochinoshizuku.name: Max Overgrowth
inochinoshizuku.desc: This is a Grass-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for five turns.

tetteikousen.name: Drum Beating
tetteikousen.desc: The user plays its drum, controlling the drum's roots to attack the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

waidofoosu.name: Flip Turn
waidofoosu.desc: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

aianrooraa.name: Triple Axel
aianrooraa.desc: A consecutive three-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successful hit.

sukeirushotto.name: Dual Wingbeat
sukeirushotto.desc: The user slams the target with its wings to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

meteobiimu.name: Scorching Sands
meteobiimu.desc: The user throws scorching sand at the target to attack. This may also leave the target with a burn.

shieruaamuzu.name: Jungle Healing
shieruaamuzu.desc: The user becomes one with the jungle, restoring HP and curing status conditions for itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.

misutobaasuto.name: Wicked Blow
misutobaasuto.desc: The user, having mastered the Dark style, strikes the target with a fierce blow. This move always lands a critical hit.

gurasusuraidaa.name: Surging Strikes
gurasusuraidaa.desc: The user, having mastered the Water style, strikes the target with a flowing motion three times in a row. This move always lands a critical hit.

raijinguboruto.name: Thunder Cage
raijinguboruto.desc: The user traps the target inside a cage of sparking electricity that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

daichinohadou.name: Dragon Energy
daichinohadou.desc: Converting its life-force into power, the user attacks opposing Pokémon. The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power.

haiyoruichigeki.name: Freezing Glare
haiyoruichigeki.desc: The user shoots its psychic power from its eyes to attack. This may also leave the target frozen.

shittonohonoo.name: Fiery Wrath
shittonohonoo.desc: The user transforms its wrath into a fire-like aura to attack. This may also make opposing Pokémon flinch.

uppunbarashi.name: Thunderous Kick
uppunbarashi.desc: The user overwhelms the target with lightning-like movement before delivering a kick. This also lowers the target's Defense stat.

porutaagaisuto.name: Glacial Lance
porutaagaisuto.desc: The user attacks by hurling a blizzard-cloaked icicle lance at opposing Pokémon.

fushokugasu.name: Astral Barrage
fushokugasu.desc: The user attacks by sending a frightful amount of small ghosts at opposing Pokémon.

koochingu.name: Eerie Spell
koochingu.desc: The user attacks with its tremendous psychic power. This also drains 3 PP from the move last used by the target.

kuikkutaan.name: Dire Claw
kuikkutaan.desc: The user lashes out at the target with ruinous claws. This may also leave the target poisoned, paralyzed, or asleep.

toripuruakuseru.name: Psyshield Bash
toripuruakuseru.desc: Cloaking itself in psychic energy, the user slams into the target. This also boosts the user’s Defense stat.

daburuuingu.name: Power Shift
daburuuingu.desc: The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats.

nessanodaichi.name: Stone Axe
nessanodaichi.desc: The user swings its stone axes at the target. Stone splinters left behind by this attack float around the target.

bukiminajumon.name: Bitter Malice
bukiminajumon.desc: The user attacks the target with spine-chilling resentment. This also lowers the target’s Attack stat.

feitarukuroo.name: Shelter
feitarukuroo.desc: The user makes its skin as hard as an iron shield, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

bariaarasshu.name: Triple Arrows
bariaarasshu.desc: The user kicks, then fires three arrows. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also lower the target’s Defense stat or make it flinch.

gansekiakkusu.name: Ceaseless Edge
gansekiakkusu.desc: The user slashes its shell blade at the target. Shell splinters left behind by this attack remain scattered under the target as spikes.

daifungeki.name: Sandsear Storm
daifungeki.desc: The user attacks by wrapping opposing Pokémon in fierce winds and searingly hot sand. This may also leave them with a burn.

ueebutakkuru.name: Lunar Blessing
ueebutakkuru.desc: The user receives a blessing from the crescent moon, restoring HP and curing status conditions for itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.

buchikamashi.name: Axe Kick
buchikamashi.desc: The user attacks by kicking up into the air and slamming its heel down upon the target. This may also confuse the target. If it misses, the user takes damage instead.

uramitsurami.name: Order Up
uramitsurami.desc: The user attacks with elegant poise. If the user has a Tatsugiri in its mouth, this move boosts one of the user's stats based on the Tatsugiri's form.

tatekomoru.name: Jet Punch
tatekomoru.desc: The user summons a torrent around its fist and punches at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

hyakkiyakou.name: Spin Out
hyakkiyakou.desc: The user spins furiously by straining its legs, inflicting damage on the target. This also harshly lowers the user's Speed stat.

kakatootoshi.name: Fillet Away
kakatootoshi.desc: The user sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by using its own HP.

ohakamairi.name: Kowtow Cleave
ohakamairi.desc: The user slashes at the target after kowtowing to make the target let down its guard. This attack never misses.

ruminakorijon.name: Flower Trick
ruminakorijon.desc: The user throws a rigged bouquet of flowers at the target. This attack never misses and always lands a critical hit.

jiettopanchi.name: Aqua Step
jiettopanchi.desc: The user toys with the target and attacks it using light and fluid dance steps. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

habaneroekisu.name: Raging Bull
habaneroekisu.desc: The user performs a tackle like a raging bull. This move's type depends on the user's form. It can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

nezumizan.name: Psyblade
nezumizan.desc: The user rends the target with an ethereal blade. This move's power is boosted by 50 percent if the user is on Electric Terrain.

aisusupinaa.name: Hydro Steam
aisusupinaa.desc: The user blasts the target with boiling-hot water. This move's power is not lowered in harsh sunlight but rather boosted by 50 percent.

shiozuke.name: Electro Drift
shiozuke.desc: The user races forward at ultrafast speeds, piercing its target with futuristic electricity. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it's a supereffective hit.

kiraasupin.name: Chilly Reception
kiraasupin.desc: The user tells a chillingly bad joke before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting. This summons a snowstorm lasting five turns.

dogezan.name: Pounce
dogezan.desc: The user attacks by pouncing on the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

torikkufurawaa.name: Trailblaze
torikkufurawaa.desc: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

fureasongu.name: Chilling Water
fureasongu.desc: The user attacks the target by showering it with water that's so cold it saps the target's power. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

akuasuteppu.name: Hyper Drill
akuasuteppu.desc: The user spins the pointed part of its body at high speed to pierce the target. This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect.

reijinguburu.name: Twin Beam
reijinguburu.desc: The user shoots mystical beams from its eyes to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

shippokiri.name: Aqua Cutter
shippokiri.desc: The user expels pressurized water to cut at the target like a blade. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

hiyamizu.name: Blood Moon
hiyamizu.desc: The user unleashes the full brunt of its spirit from a full moon that shines as red as blood. This move can't be used twice in a row.

tsuinbiimu.name: Syrup Bomb
tsuinbiimu.desc: The user sets off an explosion of sticky candy syrup, which coats the target and causes the target's Speed stat to drop each turn for three turns.

aamaakyanon.name: Electro Shot
aamaakyanon.desc: The user gathers electricity on the first turn, boosting its Sp. Atk stat, then fires a high-voltage shot on the next turn. The shot will be fired immediately in rain.

munennotsurugi.name: Tera Starstorm
munennotsurugi.desc: With the power of its crystals, the user bombards and eliminates the target. When used by Terapagos in its Stellar Form, this move damages all opposing Pokémon.

dekahanmaa.name: Burning Bulwark
dekahanmaa.desc: The user's intensely hot fur protects it from attacks and also burns any attacker that makes direct contact with it.

houfuku.name: Thunderclap
houfuku.desc: This move enables the user to attack first with a jolt of electricity. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

akuakattaa.name: Mighty Cleave
akuakattaa.desc: The user wields the light that has accumulated atop its head to cleave the target. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

shakashakahou.name: Psychic Noise
shakashakahou.desc: The user attacks the target with unpleasant sound waves. For two turns, the target is prevented from recovering HP through moves, Abilities, or held items.

mizuamebomu.name: Upper Hand
mizuamebomu.desc: The user reacts to the target's movement and strikes with the heel of its palm, making the target flinch. This move fails if the target is not readying a priority move.

erekutorobiimu.name: Electro Shot
erekutorobiimu.desc: The user gathers electricity on the first turn, boosting its Sp. Atk stat, then fires it at the target on the next turn. In rain, it strikes on the first turn.

kimagureezaa.name: Fickle Beam
kimagureezaa.desc: The user shoots a beam of light. Sometimes all the user's heads shoot beams in unison, doubling the move's power.

haadopuresu.name: Hard Press
haadopuresu.desc: The target is crushed with an arm, a claw, or the like to inflict damage. The more HP the target has left, the greater the damage.

doragoneeru.name: Dragon Cheer
doragoneeru.desc: The user raises its allies' morale with a cheer, making their attacks land critical hits more often. Dragon types get more pumped up.

miwakunoboisu.name: Alluring Voice
miwakunoboisu.desc: The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

yakeppachi.name: Temper Flare
yakeppachi.desc: Spurred by desperation, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

sandaadaibu.name: Supercell Slam
sandaadaibu.desc: The user electrifies its body and drops onto the target to inflict damage. If the move misses, the user takes damage instead.

saikonoizu.name: Psychic Noise
saikonoizu.desc: The user attacks the target with unpleasant sound waves. For two turns, the target is prevented from recovering HP through moves, Abilities, or held items.

hayategaeshi.name: Upper Hand
hayategaeshi.desc: The user reacts to the target's movement and strikes with the heel of its palm, making the target flinch. This move fails if the target is not readying a priority move.
